metadata.vibe: Trust, Stability, Dense but breathable data entry

rules: Card Headings: font-weight 600, text-lg, tight tracking.
Values/Inputs: IBM Plex Sans for tabular/numeric clarity.

layout.strategy: MODE B: Control Room Grid (Bento style).
layout.implementation: Translate to Bootstrap classes: Use .container-fluid, .row, and .col-md-6 .col-lg-4 to create a dense grid of cards.
layout.spacing: Page background should be #F4F5F4. Cards get .p-3 or .p-4 with .mb-4 to allow visual breathing room.

form_inputs.design: Clean standard Bootstrap .form-control but override focus border to #166534 and box-shadow to a subtle #86EFAC ring. No heavy shadows.

sticky_action_bar.design: Wrap the Save button and Report Note in a sticky bottom container: .position-sticky .bottom-0 .bg-white .border-top .p-3 (with high z-index). This satisfies the 'sticky save ergonomics'.

data_grouping: Card 1 (Report Setup): Fiscal Year, Report Date, Attachment
Card 2 (Core Demographics): Total Members, Loan Members
Card 3 (Capital & Funds): Share Capital, Reserved Fund, Other Fund
Card 4 (Assets & Banking): Total Assets, Bank Cash, Fixed Assets
Card 5 (Liquidity & Loans): Deposit, Loan, NPA, NPL, Liquidity
instructions_to_main_agent: Do NOT migrate to React/Tailwind. Maintain existing PHP/Bootstrap environment.
Preserve the exact HTML `name` attributes and existing POST save flow logic.
Add `data-testid` attributes to all form inputs and the save button.
Restructure the flat vertical form into a Bento-card grid grouping using Bootstrap cards, aligning with `data_grouping`.
Implement the sticky save bar so the user doesn't have to scroll to the bottom of the page to save.
